title: paraneurachne muelleri
intro: Paraneurachne muelleri, also known as the "Swan River grass" or "Queensland blue grass", is a perennial grass native to Australia. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been attributed to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water for its medicinal and health benefits.
